sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational activity necessary for business continuity and efficiency, implying no unexpected disruption or significant financial event.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
